error.invalid_port_number: ❌ Invalid port number. Port must be an integer between 1 and 65535.
prompt.tcping_host_port_required: ❌ Please provide target host and port in this format: /tcping host:port
status.testing_tcp_connection: ⏳ Testing TCP connection to {target}:{port}, please wait...
error.tcping_not_found:
❌ tcping command not found. Please install tcping.

Install:
Debian/Ubuntu: apt-get install tcptraceroute
CentOS/RHEL: yum install tcptraceroute
macOS: brew install tcping
